    Qutip tips

    September 28, 2017 less than 1 minute read

    On this page

    • Installation
    • Usage
    • Resources

    (This post is migrated from my old Blogspot. Bear with my broken English at the time.)

    Installation

    See qutip manual first.

    On Linux:

    • If conda install qutip reports package not found, use conda install -c conda-forge qutip or conda install -c conda-forge/label/broken qutip (from https://anaconda.org/conda-forge/qutip)
    • When run testing (see qutip manual) and encountered error about gcc or cc1plus, install gcc or g++, or reinstall them using sudo apt-get install --reinstall gcc.

    Usage

    Resources

    • qutip lectures
    • qutip examples
